description_long: This is a robust hammer with a solid, rectangular head and a long, slightly curved handle. The head appears to be made of dense metal, featuring a flat striking face and a blocky, utilitarian design without any visible claws or peens. The handle is dark, likely constructed from a composite or metal material, and is ergonomically shaped for a secure grip. The surface of the hammer is matte and dark, suggesting it is designed for heavy-duty use and durability in urban or construction environments. There are no visible brand markings, decorative elements, or attachments on the hammer. The overall appearance is utilitarian, with no visible signs of wear or damage.
description: A heavy-duty, dark-colored hammer with a rectangular metal head and a long, slightly curved ergonomic handle. The design is utilitarian and robust, suitable for construction or urban maintenance tasks.
description_view_0: The hammer is seen from an angled top view, highlighting the pointed end of the head and the tapering handle.
description_view_1: A side profile shows the full length of the handle and the rectangular, blocky head, emphasizing the hammer's overall proportions.
description_view_2: This view displays the underside of the hammer, revealing the curvature of the handle and the flat striking face of the head.
description_view_3: A side view from the opposite direction, showing the ergonomic curve of the handle and the solid, rectangular head.
attribute_handle_type: Curved composite handle with a matte, slightly textured surface for improved grip.
attribute_head_type: Rectangular solid steel head with a flat striking face, no claw or peen features.
